title: CENTER FOR HEALTH EDUCATION - 211info
text: SAMARITAN CENTER FOR HEALTH EDUCATION CENTER FOR HEALTH EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health and wellness classes, support groups, CPR classes, and resources that focus on prevention and managing existing conditions. Also offers wellness consultations. 740 SW 9th Street Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 574-4952 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 574-4952 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Wellness consultations are free of charge. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Support Groups First Aid Instruction General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups General Health Education Programs Wellness Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SAMARITAN CENTER FOR HEALTH EDUCATION
